Features
CEMETERY MANAGEMENT SOFTWARE | CELEBRATION OF LIFE SOFTWARE

A Modern Cemetery Management Software for All Cemeteries
REQUEST A DEMO
WHO USES EVERARK AND WHY?

LEARN WHO USES OUR CEMETERY SOFTWARE SOLUTIONS AND WHY?
We make cemetery management easier with our digital software. Now, your team will enjoy better productivity and efficiency. Maximize your investments and don’t let your earnings stay six feet under. Use our cemetery management software and quickly close deals by having a complete overview of your business, from daily tasks to cemetery mapping. 
Cemetery Teams
From cemetery managers to sales to accounting to groundskeepers to admin, everyone uses EverArk.
Plot Owners
Whether you're pre-need planning or at-need, you or your loved one can leave an everlasting digital footprint.
Family & Friends
Download the app and share comments, photos, tributes, and more to commemorate your loved one.
FOR CEMETERY TEAMS

HOW WILL YOU MANAGE YOUR CEMETERY?

Setting up a burial ground, laying out gardens and managing thousands of plots can be daunting, but with the EverArk software, all that is done in a simple and easy-to-use way.

Learn More
CELEBRATION OF LIFE TOOLS

ALLOW FAMILY AND FRIENDS TO SEARCH YOUR CEMETERY FOR LOVED ONES 
You can now share and manage Digitaphs with the public. 
What are Digitaphs?  They are digital, online Epitaphs.
Manage the online searchability of all those interred in your cemetery by sharing Digitaphs with the public.
Let the public search your cemetery online to find Digitaphs of those interred in your cemetery.
Allow family members to claim Digitaphs so they can manage, update, and share it with loved ones.
Start Searching Now
FOR PLOT OWNERS

What will be your everlasting digital footprint?

Death can be a difficult topic to approach, let alone embrace, but when we see it as integrally entwined with life, everything changes. That is why we want to help you leave behind a digital presence and memorial for your loved one to contribute towards and share so they can celebrate your life in their time of bereavement and beyond.
Online Memorial
Add a profile picture, bio, photo album, videos and personal content to build your memorial.
​
Family Tree
Map out and display your family tree to share with loved ones.

​
Memory Sharing
Share your digital memory and funeral notice with loved ones. Or, simply share it via your social sites.
​
Assign Managers
Add a designee to manage and administer your account after you have passed.
​
Donations
Setup an account to facilitate your loved ones donating to your “in memory of”.
​
Privacy Settings
Manage visibility to your online memorial so your friends and family can contribute.
Member Contribution
Enable friends and family to share comments, add photos and content to your digital legacy.
Plot Locator
Your interment site will be marked on a map for your friends and family to visit.
​
GPS Tracking
Through geo-fencing, your mobile phone will alert and share your internment site and memorial.
Content Management
Write and manage your obituary, eulogy and funeral notice to post and share with loved ones.
Plot Management
Manage your plot purchases for family members, along with their designees and digital legacies.
NEW 3D Avatar
Convert your profile picture into a full 3D rendering of your face to share with loved ones.
 
THE BEST LEGACY APP FOR FRIENDS AND FAMILY

DOWNLOAD the EVERARK app AND LET THE MEMORIES OF YOUR LOVED ONES LIVE ON FOREVER

App obituaries are becoming popular nowadays since it allows users to be notified when an obituary is posted from any of your connections. 
At EverArk, we assure users that their legacy will live on. Using our secure EverArk app, you can share photos, videos, stories, burial locations, and your eulogies with your family and friends. What better way to keep the memories of your loved ones alive?
Download and test our beta version!
Search and find memorials by legacy or resting place.
Donate to the charity your loved ones chose.
Geo-tag any burial site to share with friends and family.
Save burial locations so you can visit and share directions.
Share saved digital memorials from your favorites so you can easily see them.
Get alerts when you are close to a saved burial location of a loved one.

Take a quick tour of EverArk

Learn how EverArk can help you manage your cemetery and increase your revenue and growth.
